task_prompt: Implement the TrimKV paper (arXiv:2512.03324v2) taking inspiration from https://github.com/ngocbh/trimkv. Create a new folder D:/N projects/KV-Cache-memory-bound, write full implementation code (retention gate, memory-bounded KV cache with argmin eviction, retention-weighted attention, distillation + capacity losses, Qwen3 patch, training script, inference example, README). Log every web fetch / agent tool call / file diff as a harness trace.
